╰──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────╯
╭─ Commands ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────╮
│ run              Start a robot blueprint                                     │
│ status           Show the running DimOS instance.                            │
│ stop             Stop the running DimOS instance.                            │
│ log              View logs from a DimOS run.                                 │
│ agent-send       Send a message to the running DimOS agent via MCP.          │
│ restart          Restart the running DimOS instance with the same arguments. │
│ show-config      Show current config settings and their values.              │
│ list             List all available blueprints.                              │
│ lcmspy           LCM spy tool for monitoring LCM messages.                   │
│ agentspy         Agent spy tool for monitoring agents.                       │
│ humancli         Interface interacting with agents.                          │
│ top              Live resource monitor TUI.                                  │
│ map              Rebuild a voxel map from a recorded SQLite dataset and view │
│                  it in rerun.                                                │
│ cameracalibrate  Calibrate camera intrinsics and write ROS CameraInfo YAML.  │
│ apriltag         Generate a printable AprilTag/ArUco PDF with calibration    │
│                  ruler.                                                      │
│ rerun-bridge     Launch the Rerun visualization bridge.                      │
│ go2tool          Go2 setup utilities (BLE wifi provisioning, network         │
│                  discovery)                                                  │
│ mcp              Interact with the running MCP server                        │
│ topic            Topic commands for pub/sub                                  │
╰──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────╯
